products.title: Choose your performance level

edge.name: Edge
edge.description: Compact desktop appliance for individuals and small teams. Excellent for 7B–13B models with high-speed local inference.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: Powerful tower for teams. Handles up to 70B models, collaborative RAG, and production workloads with ease.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: Enterprise-grade system for large organizations. Massive scale inference, fine-tuning, and multi-node ready.

products.blurb: All appliances include our private inference engine and come pre-loaded with leading open-source models.

why.privacyDesc: Nothing leaves your premises. Perfect for regulated industries and sensitive IP.
why.latencyDesc: Run inference at the edge or in your data center. No network round-trips to the cloud.
why.costsDesc: One-time hardware purchase. No surprise token bills or usage-based pricing.
why.controlDesc: Choose any open-source model, fine-tune freely, and integrate with your existing stack.

custom.title: Need a custom configuration?
custom.subtitle: Contact our team for tailored enterprise quotes and volume pricing.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.regNumber: Registration number: [To be completed — Estonia company registry]
legal.operatorText: This website is operated by OwnEdge OÜ, a company to be incorporated in the Republic of Estonia. OwnEdge provides high-performance, on-premise appliances for private generative AI inference. All hardware is designed for European organizations that require full data sovereignty, low latency, and predictable costs.
legal.liabilityText1: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. While we strive for accuracy, OwnEdge makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability or availability of the products, services, or related graphics.
legal.liabilityText2: In no event will OwnEdge be liable for any loss or damage including without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, or any loss or damage whatsoever arising from loss of data or profits arising out of, or in connection with, the use of this website or the products described herein.
legal.governingLawText: These terms and any dispute arising out of or in connection with them shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Estonia.
legal.contactText: For any legal inquiries, please contact us at {{email}}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.updated: Last updated: June 2026 • Compliant with GDPR
privacy.commitmentText: At OwnEdge, privacy is not a feature — it is the foundation of everything we build. Our appliances run entirely on-premise. Your data, models, and inference workloads never leave your infrastructure. We collect the minimum information necessary to process your order and provide support.
dataList: Order information: Company name, email address, VAT number (for EU compliance and invoicing), billing and shipping addresses.
Payment information: Handled securely by Stripe. We never store full card details.
Technical data: Basic server logs for security and fraud prevention (IP address, user agent). No profiling or marketing tracking.
privacy.useIntro: We use your information solely to:
useList: Process and fulfill your hardware order
Issue invoices and manage VAT / reverse charge
Provide customer support and service subscriptions (Managed Care, SecureVault Backup)
privacy.useOutro: We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.storageText: All customer data is stored within the European Union. Payment processing is handled by Stripe (PCI-DSS compliant). We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, and port your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at {{email}}.
privacy.cookiesText: This site uses only essential technical cookies for cart persistence and checkout flow. No third-party analytics or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page.
privacy.copyright: © {year} {brand} — Private generative AI infrastructure for Europe

about.title: About OwnEdge
about.subtitle: Private generative AI infrastructure, built for European organizations that demand control.
about.missionText: OwnEdge exists to give European teams and organizations full ownership of their generative AI workloads. No cloud. No data exfiltration. No unpredictable token costs. Just powerful, on-premise appliances that run the latest open-source models at the edge or in your datacenter — with complete sovereignty.
about.founderP1: OwnEdge was founded by Alexandre Bureau, an engineer with deep expertise in high-performance computing.
about.founderP2: He has extensive experience designing, building, and operating very large HPC clusters for the most demanding AI and scientific workloads. His background spans advanced industrial systems and energy infrastructure (previously at GE) and he currently contributes to a leading name in the high-performance computing industry.
about.founderP3: This unique combination of large-scale systems experience and focus on European data sovereignty led to OwnEdge: purpose-built appliances that deliver enterprise-grade generative AI performance without compromising privacy or control.
about.whyText: Every system we ship — from the compact Edge desktop to the full-scale Forge enterprise rack — is engineered for one purpose: running private, high-performance inference on your terms.
whyList: Optional managed services and encrypted backup
Full European data residency and support
Predictable one-time hardware cost + optional recurring services
about.copyright: © {year} {brand} — Private generative AI infrastructure for Europe
